chapter_title: Admin. Adjudication of Vehicle Parking & Stopping Offenses
text:
In an administrative adjudication hearing under this chapter:

(1) it is presumed that the registered owner of the motor vehicle is the person who parked or stopped the vehicle at the time and place of the offense charged; and

(2) the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles’ computer-generated record of the registered vehicle owner is prima facie evidence of the contents of the record.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 682. Admin. Adjudication of Vehicle Parking & Stopping Offenses
##### § 682.008 — Presumptions

In an administrative adjudication hearing under this chapter:

    (1) it is presumed that the registered owner of the motor vehicle is the person who parked or stopped the vehicle at the time and place of the offense charged; and

    (2) the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles’ computer-generated record of the registered vehicle owner is prima facie evidence of the contents of the record.

*Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 933 (H.B.3097), Sec. 2Q.01, eff. September 1, 2009.*

subsections.text: In an administrative adjudication hearing under this chapter:
it is presumed that the registered owner of the motor vehicle is the person who parked or stopped the vehicle at the time and place of the offense charged; and
the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles’ computer-generated record of the registered vehicle owner is prima facie evidence of the contents of the record.
